evals.expected_output: Full initial setup: asks for role, company, name, vault path, creates config and symlinks
expectations: Asks for user's role (e.g., Solutions Engineer)
Asks for company name
Asks for SE name and initials
Asks for Obsidian vault path
Searches the web for company products and presents for review
Creates config file at ~/.claude/skills/sales-config.md with all values
Creates symlinks in ~/.claude/skills/ for each ld-* skill directory
Creates vault folder structure (Daily/, {config.company_folder}/Accounts/)
Checks for old commands in ~/.claude/commands/ and migrates if found
Offers optional Salesforce CLI setup
Offers optional Playwright CLI setup
Offers optional Google Calendar setup
Reports summary of all actions taken

evals.expected_output: Salesforce CLI setup only, does not ask for name/vault/company
expectations: Checks if sf CLI is installed with 'which sf'
If not installed, offers to install via Homebrew
Runs sf org login web with instance URL
Verifies authentication with sf org list
Discovers custom Salesforce fields for SE status
Updates config with salesforce_username, instance_url, se_status_field, custom_fields
Sets salesforce_configured to true in config
Does NOT ask for SE name or vault path
Checks if playwright-cli is installed with 'which playwright-cli'
If not installed, runs npm install -g @playwright/cli@latest
Runs playwright-cli install to download browser binaries
Sets playwright_configured to true in config
Does NOT ask for SE name or vault path
Lists available Google Calendar accounts via MCP tool
User selects which calendar to use
Updates config with calendar_id, calendar_user_emails, calendar_mode, calendar_include_prep
Sets calendar_configured to true in config
Does NOT ask for SE name or vault path

evals.expected_output: Re-running setup preserves existing config values and pulls upstream updates
expectations: Existing config file detected and read
Upstream updates pulled if upstream remote exists
Symlinks re-created or verified
Existing config values preserved (not re-prompted)
Reports what was updated vs. already current
